mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM gamedb.map_spawn_point WHERE stage = #{stage}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gamedb.map_spawn_point WHERE stage = #{stage} AND x = #{x} AND z = #{z}
SELECT id FROM gamedb.map_spawn_point ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamedb.map_spawn_point (id, stage, x, z, description) VALUES (#{id}, #{stage}, #{x}, #{z}, #{description})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gamedb.map_spawn_point WHERE x = #{x} AND z = #{z}
mapper.select: SELECT x, z FROM gamedb.map_spawn_point WHERE stage = #{stage}
